```{r}
library(wingen)
library(here)
library(sf)
library(tidyverse)
library(terra)
library(vcfR)
source(here("general_functions.R"))
```

```{r}
gea_dos <- read_table(here("analysis", "gea", "outputs", "genes.raw"))
dos <- read_table(here("analysis", "gea", "outputs", "nogea_thinned.raw"))

coords <- get_coords(sf = TRUE) %>% filter(SampleID %in% gea_dos$IID) %>% st_transform(3310)
gea_dos <- gea_dos[gea_dos$IID %in% coords$SampleID, ]
dos <- dos[dos$IID %in% coords$SampleID, ]

# Confirm orders are the same
stopifnot(all(dos$IID == gea_dos$IID))
stopifnot(all(dos$IID == coords$SampleID))

# Convert to heterozygosity using ifelse for matrices
het <- dos[, -(1:6)]
gea_het <- gea_dos[, -(1:6)]
het <- matrix(ifelse(het == 1, 1, 0), nrow = nrow(het), ncol = ncol(het))
gea_het <- matrix(ifelse(gea_het == 1, 1, 0), nrow = nrow(gea_het), ncol = ncol(gea_het))

# Confirm conversion works (same number of 1s)
stopifnot(sum(het == 1, na.rm = TRUE) == sum(dos[, -(1:6)] == 1, na.rm = TRUE))
stopifnor(sum(gea_het == 1, na.rm = TRUE) == sum(gea_dos[, -(1:6)] == 1, na.rm = TRUE))
```

```{r}
lyr <- coords_to_raster(coords, res = 10000)

png(here("analysis", "gea", "plots", "gea_genes.png"), width = 800, height = 800)
#sc <- preview_gd(lyr, coords, wdim = 7)
#sc[sc == 0] <- NA
#plot(sc)
wg2 <- wg
wg2[wg2 < 0.04] <- NA
plot_gd(wg2)
dev.off()


# setup parallel session
future::plan("multisession", workers = 10)

wg <- window_general(het, coords, lyr, stat = "Ho", wdim = 7, min_n = 1)
wg_gea <- window_general(gea_het, coords, lyr, stat = "Ho", wdim = 7, min_n = 1)
future::plan("sequential")




# Read in climate data
env_data <- rast(here("data", "env", "california_env_stack.tif"))
bio1 <- env_data[["CHELSA_bio1_1981-2010_V.2.1"]]
bio1 <- terra::extract(bio1, coords, ID = FALSE)[,1]

custom <- function(x) var(x, na.rm = TRUE)
wenv <- window_general(bio1, coords, lyr, stat = custom, wdim = 7, min_n = 1)


png(here("analysis", "gea", "plots", "wingen.png"), width = 1600, height = 800)
par(mfrow = c(1, 3))
wg2 <- wg
wg2[wg2 < 0.03] <- NA
plot_gd(wg2)
points(coords)
wg_gea2 <- wg_gea
wg_gea2[wg_gea2 < 0.10] <- NA
plot_gd(wg_gea2)
points(coords)
plot_gd(wenv)
points(coords)
dev.off()
```
